# Ground truth for sample.rm — handwriting captured from a reMarkable tablet
# and synced via the Prose desktop app on 2026-04-25. The page contains a
# vertical list of distinctive tokens; this transcription comes from the
# notebook's pageOCRCache (confidence=1 from Prose's production pipeline).
#
# Matching is case-insensitive substring, so multi-word phrases are split
# into their constituent words to make the test robust against OCR variation
# in word boundaries (e.g. "timemachine" still matches "time" and "machine").
penguin
parallel
lambda
47
telescope
obsidian
fortune
time
machine
Buddhism
glacier
Alaska
